units.content: system computes empirical entropy over a rolling window of measurement values for a target entity
system computes declared-variety value as a cardinality-derived function of the automated actor's most recent structured pointer set
system compares empirical entropy against declared-variety value
empirical entropy exceeds declared-variety value by a predetermined margin, triggering subsequent actions
system emits a requisite-variety-deficit event in the append-only event log
system suspends production of further action records from the automated actor referencing the target entity
system maintains suspension until pointer set is updated or a manual-override event is committed by an authorized operator
